action.finish_summary: Elicited requirements for the tourism management website: 1) Two user roles: administrators and regular users. 2) Registration and login system secured by passwords. 3) Scenic spot management with CRUD operations (add, delete, modify, query). 4) Messaging system where regular users can send messages and administrators can reply. 5) Administrators manage user records and reply to messages. 6) Regular users can browse scenic spots, send messages, and edit their own personal information. 7) Visual style: mint color background with dark sea green components. Many specific details (scenic spot data fields, messaging layout, navigation style, display format, input validation, deletion confirmations, mobile optimization, etc.) remain undecided by the user.
